name: callout
description: Structured aside with a title and a repeating list of items (icon + label + url + optional description). Six role-named variants pick the layout shape and accent color: links, files, people (avatars), data (dense), note (prose), quote (pull-quote).

title.description: Short uppercase eyebrow above the items list (e.g. 'Reach Tim', 'Downloads', 'Guests in this piece'). Empty = no title row.

items.description: Rows. Each row has an icon key, a label, a URL, and an optional description. Files variant additionally honors ext/size; people variant honors image_url/initials. Ignored by note/quote variants.

icon.description: Icon key from the Icons palette (globe, instagram, facebook, youtube, x, github, linktree, email, phone, file, file-pdf, file-zip, file-dxf, avatar, link). Unknown keys fall back to 'link'.

label.description: Primary text shown on the row.

url.description: Destination URL. Empty rows are skipped at render time.

description.description: Optional secondary line under the label.

ext.description: files-variant only: file-type badge text (e.g. PDF, ZIP, DXF).

size.description: files-variant only: human-readable file size (e.g. '412 KB').

image_url.description: people-variant only: avatar image URL. If absent, initials are used.

initials.description: people-variant only: 1–2 letter fallback when no image_url is set.

body.description: Long-form HTML for variants `note` and `quote`. Authored via TinyMCE in the metabox repeater UI (Phase B); for now, paste-JSON. Sanitized with wp_kses_post on save. Ignored by list-style variants.

attribution.description: quote-variant only: short attribution line shown below the pull-quote.

variant.description: Role-named visual treatment. links/files/people/data render items as a list. note renders body as prose. quote renders body as a large italic pull-quote with attribution.
